case_title: CALVIN KRISTOPHER AROMIN VS. MAPLEBEAR INC.

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CLAVIN KRISTOPHER AROMIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA YU. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO DEC-14-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CALVIN KRISTOPHER AROMIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA YU, PARALEGAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AROMIN, CALVIN KRISTOPHER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC. DBA INSTACART DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $0. THE TERMS OF THE REFERRAL OFFER SPECIFIED THE MAXIMUM TIME BETWEEN SIGN-UP AND COMPLETION OF SHOPPING TRIPS AND DEFENDANT WAS WITHIN ITS RIGHTS TO INSIST ON THAT TERM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
